name: apodictic
description: APODICTIC Development Editor. Developmental editing that listens before diagnosing.

interface.shortDescription: Structural developmental editing for fiction and narrative nonfiction.
interface.longDescription: APODICTIC is a skill-first developmental editing framework for fiction and narrative nonfiction. It routes writers into diagnosis, audits, research, plot coaching, and revision planning while keeping a strict no-rewrite firewall.
defaultPrompt: Use APODICTIC to tell me what kind of manuscript help I need.
Use APODICTIC to diagnose the structural problems in this draft.
Use APODICTIC to help me plan revisions without rewriting prose.
